global_requirements.multi_tenant_isolation: Tenant-scoped Silver, Gold, and Platinum tables carry tenant_id and account_id where applicable. Postgres enforces row-level security on tenant_id. Lakehouse storage uses tenant bucketing and tenant-scoped access policies.
global_requirements.replayability: Every decision reconstructs from immutable Bronze ingests, canonical Silver inputs, versioned policy materializations, replay artifacts, and Gold proof records through decision_frame_id and content hashes.
global_requirements.auditability: Authoritative facts are append-only or hash-anchored. No silent mutation is allowed for decision evidence, trace evidence, proof records, or delivery attempt logs.
global_requirements.streaming_and_batch: All tables support event-time incremental loads and historical backfills through idempotency keys, schema_version, and event timestamps.

tables.purpose: Immutable raw ingest log for provider signals from WattTime, Ember, Electricity Maps, EIA, water datasets, and equivalent sources.

schema.description: carbon, grid, water, structural, or forecast.
moer_current, moer_forecast, grid_mix, water_stress, or equivalent.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by ingested_at month; cluster by provider_name and region_code.
tables.data_retention_policy: Hot for 400 days, immutable archive for 7 years.

tables.purpose: Immutable raw intake for tenant policy bundles, rule changes, approvals, and external governance artifacts.
tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by received_at month with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Immutable for 7 years minimum.

tables.purpose: Raw immutable intake for webhook payloads, external approvals, provider callbacks, and signed receipts.
tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by received_at month with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Hot for 180 days, archive for 7 years when linked to audit or delivery verification.

tables.purpose: Immutable raw intake for authorization requests, decision-engine commands, and replay submissions before canonicalization.

schema.description: Stable workload family or job key.
Placements or runtime candidates before normalization.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by request_received_at day with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Hot for 18 months, immutable archive for 7 years.

tables.purpose: Immutable raw operating telemetry intake for latency, freshness, replay, delivery, and availability metrics.
tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by observed_at day; cluster by source_component and metric_name.
tables.data_retention_policy: Raw telemetry hot for 90 days, warm for 400 days, then rely on Gold rollups.

tables.purpose: Canonical provider records with shared units across grid, carbon, water, and forecast domains.

schema.description: carbon_current, carbon_forecast, water_stress, renewable_ratio, or equivalent.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by observed_at day; cluster by region_code and signal_family.
tables.data_retention_policy: Hot for 25 months, immutable archive for 7 years.

tables.purpose: Reconciled point-in-time state per region and window selecting primary and fallback provider basis for routing.

schema.description: Rule identifier that produced the state.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by state_window_start day; cluster by region_code.
tables.data_retention_policy: Hot for 25 months, archive for 7 years.

tables.purpose: Versioned canonical materialization of policy bundles and rule sets used by the evaluator.

schema.description: Hash of the fully materialized bundle.
Human review status for assisted mappings.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by effective_from month with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Immutable for 7 years minimum.

tables.purpose: Rule-by-rule deterministic policy trace for each decision frame.

schema.description: Hash of canonical inputs consumed by the trace.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by trace_started_at day with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Immutable for 7 years.

tables.purpose: Canonical decision input schema containing normalized workload intent, constraints, reconciled signal state, and policy version.

schema.description: Canonical workload family or job key.
Canonical placement, latency, policy, and compliance constraints.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by prepared_at day with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Immutable for 7 years.

tables.purpose: Replay-ready intermediate artifacts such as candidate sets, score vectors, provider basis snapshots, and water basis snapshots.

schema.description: candidate_set, score_vector, provider_basis, water_basis, or policy_basis.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by created_at day with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Hot for 25 months, archive for 7 years.

tables.purpose: Canonical metering events for billing, quotas, delivery, replay, and proof usage.
tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by event_at day with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Hot for 25 months, archive for 7 years.

tables.purpose: Canonicalized SLO and performance measurements derived from raw telemetry and system tables.

schema.description: engine, dashboard, replay, outbox, or provider_router.
Raw metric or aggregate source reference.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by aggregation_window_start day; cluster by service_name and metric_name.
tables.data_retention_policy: Hot for 400 days, then rely on Gold rollups for long-term history.

tables.purpose: Authoritative final routing decision fact table for run_now, reroute, delay, throttle, and deny outcomes.

schema.description: Canonical workload family or job key.
run_now, reroute, delay, throttle, or deny.
Chosen region when execution is authorized.
Provider basis used for the decision.
Earliest authorized execution time for delay decisions.
Confidence of the final routing basis.
Current proof hash associated with the decision.
Signing time when a proof-backed decision packet is emitted.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by created_at day with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Hot for 25 months, immutable archive for 7 years or tenant retention override.

tables.purpose: Immutable proof and hash-chain table providing tamper-evident continuity over decision packets, traces, and replay artifacts.

schema.description: Decision frame tied to the proof.
Hash of the authoritative payload protected by the chain.
Ledger, notary, or object manifest target.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by immutable_recorded_at month with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Retain immutably for 7 years minimum.

tables.purpose: Authoritative event outbox table for signed downstream deliveries, export triggers, and integration fan-out.

schema.description: Decision frame that caused the message.
pending, processing, delivered, failed, or dead_letter.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by first_queued_at day with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Hot until terminal plus 400 days, archive for 7 years when tied to proof, billing, or audit.

tables.purpose: Append-only log of every outbound delivery attempt, including retry behavior, response evidence, and verification results.

schema.description: Decision frame tied to the attempt.
Canonical digest of retained response body.
Stable request idempotency key sent to the destination.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by log_created_at day with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Hot for 400 days, archive for 7 years when tied to compliance or disputes.

tables.purpose: Minute-level SLO fact table for decision latency, availability, provider freshness, replay consistency, and outbox health.

schema.description: Calendar date of the minute bucket.
Start of the minute aggregation bucket.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by metric_date month with clustering by service_name and slo_name.
tables.data_retention_policy: Minute facts hot for 400 days and daily rollups retained for 25 months or longer.

tables.purpose: Authoritative freshness and confidence fact table per provider, region, and signal family.

schema.description: Latest available observed time from the provider.
Threshold above which the signal is stale.
Whether freshness is within the operational SLO.
Canonical signal records contributing to the fact.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by metric_date month with clustering by provider_name, signal_family, and region_code.
tables.data_retention_policy: Daily facts for 25 months, archive for 7 years when used in compliance evidence.

tables.purpose: Hourly tenant and account usage fact table for billing, quotas, customer reporting, and revenue control.

schema.description: Calendar date of the usage bucket.
Start of the hour aggregation bucket.
Number of proof or evidence exports.
Projected or verified carbon savings in grams.
Projected or verified water savings in liters.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by usage_date month with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Hot for 25 months, archive for 7 years because billing and disputes may require reconstruction.

tables.purpose: Audit-ready decision lineage fact table materializing evidence pointers required for compliance exports and external review.

schema.description: Proof chain record anchoring the decision.
Whether all required lineage edges are present.
Number of provider signal records contributing to the decision.
Normalized provider basis summary for audit display.
Retention classification applied to the evidence set.
Whether the fact set is eligible for regulated export.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by created_at month with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Immutable for 7 years minimum and longer when contractual or regulatory retention requires it.

tables.purpose: Daily customer-facing dashboard aggregate powering account views, trend charts, proof coverage, and operational outcomes.

schema.description: Aggregated projected or verified carbon savings.
Aggregated projected or verified water savings.
Average decision latency based on Gold SLO facts.
Count of provider freshness SLO breaches affecting the tenant.
Percentage of decisions carrying complete proof coverage.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by metric_date month with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Daily dashboard facts retained online for 25 months and regenerated from Gold for longer windows.

tables.purpose: Managed export manifest table for disclosures, evidence packs, customer audit bundles, and compliance reporting outputs.

schema.description: Hash of the Gold and Platinum source snapshot used for the export.
Secure object location of the export artifact.
Hash of the final export artifact.
Expiration time for temporary delivery URLs.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by generated_at month with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Manifest rows retained for 7 years; export artifacts follow tenant retention and disclosure policy.

tables.purpose: Feature store table for assistive analytics and AI features using only governed derived facts, never authoritative classifications without human review.

schema.description: Stable entity identifier within the tenant.
Derived rate of policy overrides or exceptions.
Whether the row is eligible for downstream analytics labeling.
Human review gate state required for any assistive AI classification use.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by feature_date month with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Keep online for 25 months and rebuild older features from Gold on demand.

tables.purpose: Monthly executive reporting aggregate for commercial health, operational quality, savings delivery, and proof coverage.

schema.description: First day of the reporting month.
Number of active accounts during the month.
Total routing decisions during the month.
Total billable units in the month.
Average P95 decision latency across the month.
Percentage of decisions with full proof coverage.
Number of disclosure or audit exports generated.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by month_start year with hash subpartition on tenant_id.
tables.data_retention_policy: Keep for 7 years because executive and board reporting may need long-horizon reconstruction.

tables.purpose: Privacy-preserving benchmark aggregate for cross-tenant comparisons, product analytics, and market baselines without exposing raw tenant data.

schema.description: Plan tier represented in the cohort.
Number of tenants included in the cohort.
Minimum anonymity threshold enforced for publication.
Privacy budget consumed when differential privacy is applied.

tables.partitioning_strategy: Range partition by benchmark_date month with clustering by peer_group and metric_name.
tables.data_retention_policy: Keep benchmark outputs for 25 months online and regenerate longer history from Gold under privacy thresholds.
